message: This is my testing's for the m'esage feature We will b`e seeing how far we can go witth the message and then go farther fwoinf
I have this new feature for you my love. Every day there will be another special message for just you.

12/24/24, This means is Christmas Eve. This will have to be the last one we will spend apart. God willing we will be together forever at that point or I will do my best to visit with Marky. He says he would be willing to not get gifts so we could go there (i would never do this) but it shows he really wants to meet you.
Well Darling its Christmas and may I be the First to say MERRY CHRISTMAS!!!!. You deserve more than I could ever give on this day but I will give you big kiss my love.
Thanks to you, I smile a little more, laugh a little harder, and cry a little less. I am so lucky to have you in my life. I don't know where I would be without your love.
To the most wonderful woman I know, thank you for constantly bringing out the best in me.
There is nothing I want more than to make you the happiest woman in the world.
Your beauty, intelligence, and kindness make me fall in love with you more and more every day!
Each day with you is a wonderful addition to my life's journey. I can't wait for forever together.
Here its New Years Day. HAPPY NEW YEAR my love. You know today for a whole 11 hours we will not be in the same year. But I still love you the same
Wake Up maybe drink too much haha. I hope you had a wonderfull night my love. Next year I will do my best to give yo ua new years kiss
No other woman in the world can hold a candle to your beauty, charm, and grace.
Love is like a fart. If you have to force it, it's probably not going to be good.
I love you more than coffee, but please don't make me prove it

Love is patient, love is kind. It does not envy, it does not boast, it is not proud. It does not dishonor others, it is not self-seeking, it is not easily angered, it keeps no record of wrongs. Love does not delight in evil but rejoices with the truth. It always protects, always trusts, always hopes, always perseveres. - 1 Corinthians 13:4-7
I'd climb Mount Everest for you... but I'd rather just order takeout and watch Netflix.
The greatest happiness of life is the conviction that we are loved; loved for ourselves, or rather, loved in spite of ourselves.- Victor Hugo
I love you with all my Butt. I would say Heart but my butt is bigger haha.
Your a big scoop of awsomeness, covered with nerd, sprinkled with bad ass, and topped off with a big dollop of fucking hot
Love is like riding a motorcycle. It's easy to get on, but hard to stay on.
Two souls on two wheels, a love story written in chrome and asphalt.
The wind in our hair, the road stretching before us, and a love that roars like an engine.
Found my forever passenger, and the open road is our sanctuary.
Every curve, every gear shift, a reminder of the exhilarating ride of our love.
More than just a ride, it's an adventure with you, my love.
หัวใจของฉันเต้นเป็นจังหวะเดียวกับเธอ
เธอคือดวงอาทิตย์ที่ส่องสว่างชีวิตฉัน
รักแท้ไม่จำกัดเวลาและสถานที่
เธอทำให้ฉันรู้จักความสุขที่แท้จริง
ขอบคุณที่อยู่เคียงข้างเสมอ
Somtimes It just best keep it simple: รักเธอตลอดไป
I love you more .... I win!!
I love you like a fat kid loves cake (I was a fat kid)
Smile I F***ing Love you
I love you more now than yesterday, Yesterday you got on my nerves (just a joke)
I want food, cuddles and exercise. I am basically your puppy
I cant wait till I roll over and kiss you good moring instead of sending a text
I am not perfect. I will annoy you, piss you off and say stupid things. But I promise you I'll love you more than anyone in the world.
HAPPY BIRTHDAY!!!! Welcome to 34 you know what that means? You are still young and beautifull while I am still a Old man haha.
I love you more than the miles between us.
If I had to choose between breathing or loving you, I would say 'I love you' with my last breath.
I you against reason, against promise, against peace, against hope, against happiness, against all discouragement that could be.
I will love you all my life and when I die, I will still love you through eternity and beyond.
Love is the master key that opens the gates of happiness.
To love is nothing. To be loved is something. But to love and be loved, that's everything.
Once upon a time there was a boy who loved a girl, and her laughter was a question he wanted to spend his whole life answering.
Well I will be working today and waiting to get on a flight to come see you. This will be a long trip but so worth it.
You know you're in love when you can't fall asleep because reality is finally better than your dreams.- Dr. Seuss
Feel Free to use kisses as a method to shut me up anytime
I'm not a religious person but I do sometimes think God made you for me.
Loved you yesterday, love you still, always have, always will
If not for you, my sky would fall. Rain would gather, too. Without your love, I'd be nowhere at all. I'd be lost, if not for you.
They say love is the best investment; the more you give, the more you get in return.
Never above you. Never below you. Always beside you.
Love does not consist in gazing at each other, but in looking outward together in the same direction.
La mesure de l'amour, c'est d'aimer sans mesure.
Le cœur a ses raisons que la raison ne connaît point.
Beloved, let us love one another, for love is of God; and everyone who loves is born of God and knows God. - 1 John 4:7
Our First Full Day of Being Husband and Wife : เธอคือภรรยาที่ดีที่สุดในโลก
ชีวิตของฉันสมบูรณ์แบบเพราะมีเธอ
Aimer, c'est trouver sa richesse hors de soi.
Ma chérie, tu es le soleil de ma vie.
Je t'aime plus que les étoiles dans le ciel.
Good morning to the queen of my heart! I won't be able to stop thinking about you until I finally get to see you again.
Mon amour pour toi est éternel.
Lets Flip A coins Head I am yours Tails you are mine
Your the reason I look at my phone smile then bump into things
I love being married. It's so great to find one special person you want to annoy for the rest of your life.
As a man in a relationship, you have a choice: You can be right or you can be happy.
The best way to get most husbands to do something is to suggest that perhaps they're too old to do it.
I love you, not only for what you are, but for what I am when I am with you.
I've never had a moment's doubt. I love you. I believe in you completely. You are my dearest one. My reason for life.
